name: Word Cloud
description: Create a word-cloud image from text with configurable dimensions, colors, font, language, stop words, scale, and capitalization.

auth.hint: Subscribe to Word Cloud API on RapidAPI and use the assigned RapidAPI key in the X-RapidAPI-Key header.

tools.name: create_word_cloud
tools.description: Generate a base64-encoded word-cloud image from supplied text and optional visual settings.

params.name: X-RapidAPI-Host
params.description: RapidAPI routing header; set it to textvis-word-cloud-v1.p.rapidapi.com.

params.name: text
params.description: Text from which to generate the word cloud.

params.name: scale
params.description: Scale factor for the generated word cloud; the official example uses 0.5.

params.name: width
params.description: Output image width in pixels; the official example uses 400.

params.name: height
params.description: Output image height in pixels; the official example uses 400.

params.name: colors
params.description: Array of hexadecimal colors to use in the word cloud.

params.name: font
params.description: Font name for rendered words; the official example uses Tahoma.

params.name: use_stopwords
params.description: Whether to remove stop words for the selected language.

params.name: language
params.description: Language code used for stop-word processing; the official example uses en.

params.name: uppercase
params.description: Whether words should be rendered in uppercase.
